### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>storybookjs/storybook</summary>

### [`v5.3.9`](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​539-January-24-2020)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/compare/v5.3.8...v5.3.9)

##### Bug Fixes

-   Addon-docs: Revert breaking source indentation fix ([#​9609](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/9609))

### [`v5.3.8`](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​538-January-22-2020)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/compare/v5.3.7...v5.3.8)

##### Bug Fixes

-   Addon-docs:  Fix TS false default value in prop table ([#​9560](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/9560))
-   Addon-knobs: Fix broken repo link in empty panel ([#​9530](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/9530))
-   Typescript: Export IStory in `@storybook/angular` ([#​9097](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/9097))
-   Fixed Angular button example story ([#​9540](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/9540))
-   Clean usage of `@types/webpack-env` dep in all packages ([#​9536](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/9536))

</details>
